era: Seattle, Washington. Jagjaguwar Records. Vocal layering and electronic processing. Re-examined here in electronic context -- the dissolution of voice into electronic texture as primary compositional language.

location.origin: Seattle, Washington. Originally from the Pacific Northwest.
location.formative: Seattle's experimental music community. Jagjaguwar Records (Bloomington, IN / national). The intersection of Art Pop vocal practice and electronic production techniques. Loop pedals, vocal processing, and layered recording as compositional method.
location.career: Briana Marela -- Art Pop / Electronic. All We Are (2015, Jagjaguwar). Vocal layering as primary instrument. Electronic-context reframing at degree 103. SIXTH return artist.

members.name: Briana Marela
members.note: Solo artist. First appeared at degree 72 (Art Pop, E=2). Returns at degree 103 in electronic context (E=3). The voice is both the source material and the electronic instrument.

associated_musicians.name: Briana Marela (original)
associated_musicians.note: Art Pop framing. Voice as architecture. Jagjaguwar. E=2.

associated_musicians.name: NAVVI
associated_musicians.note: Electronic atmosphere with rhythmic foundation. Different electronic vocabulary from Briana Marela's vocal-textural approach.

associated_musicians.name: Sky Cries Mary
associated_musicians.note: Atmospheric vocal wash where the voice remains identifiable. Briana Marela's dissolution goes further.

associated_musicians.name: Erik Blood
associated_musicians.note: External electronic production -- applied to others' music. Briana Marela's electronic production is internal -- processing her own voice.

associated_musicians.name: Kimya Dawson
associated_musicians.note: Dawson returned in solo context (from Moldy Peaches). Briana Marela returns in electronic context. Two return artists, two reframing strategies.

theory_nodes.concept: The layered dissolution (one hundred fourth acoustic element -- the quality produced when a human voice is looped, processed, layered, and stacked until it dissolves into electronic texture; when the boundary between vocal and synthesizer becomes permeable; human becomes machine becomes atmosphere; Briana Marela's vocal layering practice heard as electronic production)
examples: Briana Marela electronic (degree 103) -- voice dissolved into electronic texture. Looped, processed, stacked vocals become indistinguishable from synthesizer pads.
Contrast with the ethereal wash (degree 90, Sky Cries Mary) -- atmospheric but the voice remains identifiable as voice. The layered dissolution goes further.
Contrast with the algorithmic tenderness (degree 97, Postal Service electronic) -- machine warmth as composition. The layered dissolution is human warmth processed into machine form.
Contrast with Art Pop vocal layering (degree 72, Briana Marela original) -- voice as architecture. The layered dissolution is voice as electronic material.
theory_nodes.description: The layered dissolution is the 104th acoustic element. Voice looped, processed, and stacked until it dissolves into electronic texture. Human becomes machine becomes atmosphere. The boundary between vocal and synthesizer becomes permeable.

ancestors: Art Pop vocal layering (degree 72, Briana Marela original) -- voice as architecture. The layered dissolution is voice as electronic material.
The ethereal wash (degree 90, Sky Cries Mary) -- atmospheric but voice remains identifiable. The dissolution goes further.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred four acoustic elements across one hundred three degrees. Track element 105 at degree 104.

theory_nodes.concept: The electronic reframing (one hundred fourth artist-city pattern -- re-examining a non-electronic artist through electronic production lens; same practice heard as different compositional language; degree 72 = voice as Art Pop architecture; degree 103 = voice as electronic material; extends the re-contextualized return from degree 97)
examples: Briana Marela at degree 72 (Art Pop) vs degree 103 (Art Pop/Electronic). Same artist, different analytical center.
Extends the re-contextualized return (degree 97, Postal Service electronic). Both demonstrate that same work supports multiple framings.
Sixth return artist in the engine. Return pattern continues to deepen.
theory_nodes.description: The electronic reframing is the 104th artist-city pattern. Re-examining a non-electronic artist through electronic production lens. Same practice, different analytical center.

ancestors: The re-contextualized return (degree 97, Postal Service electronic) -- same work, different lens. The electronic reframing is a specific instance of the re-contextualized return.
Art Pop vocal layering (degree 72, Briana Marela original) -- the original framing that the electronic reframing reinterprets.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred four artist-city patterns across one hundred three degrees. Track pattern 105 at degree 104.

theory_nodes.concept: Art Pop/Electronic at Genre Stage 85 -- hybrid classification for voice-as-electronic-texture; distinguished from pure Art Pop (72) and Dream Pop/Electronic (93); electronic processing of the voice is the primary analytical subject
examples: Briana Marela electronic (degree 103) -- Art Pop/Electronic at Genre Stage 85.
Distinguished from Art Pop (degree 72, Briana Marela original). The electronic processing changes the genre classification.
Distinguished from Dream Pop/Electronic (degree 93, NAVVI). NAVVI's electronic layer is rhythmic; Briana Marela's is vocal-textural.
Continues the electronic era deepening -- nine electronic-adjacent entries since degree 86.
theory_nodes.description: Art Pop/Electronic at Genre Stage 85. Hybrid genre for voice-as-electronic-texture. The electronic processing of the voice is the primary analytical subject.

ancestors: Art Pop (degree 72, Briana Marela original). Genre shifts with analytical framing.
Dream Pop/Electronic (degree 93, NAVVI). Different electronic vocabulary.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 85 at degree 103. Track at 104.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 103 -- energy rises from E=2 (degree 72) to E=3; electronic production density increases the energy footprint; the same artist at different energy levels depending on analytical framing
examples: Briana Marela electronic (degree 103) -- E=3. Up from E=2 at degree 72.
Electronic production density increases perceived energy. More layers, more processing, more sonic information per second.
The energy rise is defensible: electronic context adds production complexity that raises the footprint from intimate Art Pop (E=2) to mid-range electronic (E=3).
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 103. Energy rises from E=2 at degree 72. Electronic production density increases the energy footprint.

ancestors: E=2 at degree 72 (Briana Marela original). Energy rises with electronic reframing.

cross_references.relationship: SAME ARTIST, DIFFERENT LENS! Degree 72 framed as Art Pop -- voice as architecture, E=2. Degree 103 reframes as Art Pop/Electronic -- voice as electronic material, E=3. Sixth return artist.
ELECTRONIC SPECTRUM. NAVVI's Dream Pop/Electronic is rhythmic and atmospheric. Briana Marela's Art Pop/Electronic is vocal and textural. Different electronic vocabularies.
ETHEREAL CONTRAST. Sky Cries Mary's ethereal wash keeps the voice identifiable. Briana Marela's layered dissolution dissolves voice into texture.
RETURN PATTERN. Dawson returned in solo context. Briana Marela returns in electronic context. Two return artists, two reframing strategies.
ELECTRONIC PRODUCTION. Blood's production is external -- applied to others' music. Briana Marela's electronic production is internal -- processing her own voice.
